Live updatesLive updates, 
Iran to reveal its plan for Strait of Hormuz soon as Israel attacks Lebanon and Gaza, killing and wounding dozens.
articles.description: Iran to reveal its plan for Strait of Hormuz soon as Israel attacks Lebanon and Gaza, killing and wounding dozens.
articles.title: Iran war live: Tehran plans tolls in Hormuz; Trump warns of ‘very bad time’

articles.author: Al Jazeera
articles.content:
Military and law enforcement clashed with demonstrators outside La Paz, Bolivia, in an attempt to clear roadways that had been blocked as part of nationwide antigovernment protests.
As many as 3,500… [+2935 chars]
articles.description: The government of Rodrigo Paz has sent about 3,500 soldiers and police to clear protesters demanding his resignation.
articles.title: Bolivia launches early-morning crackdown on roadblocks outside La Paz

articles.title: Two presidential campaign staffers killed in Colombia as elections near

articles.description: Taiwan says it will maintain ‘status quo’ and deepen ties with the US after Trump meets with China’s Xi Jinping.
